name: Bloodbath
author: Riot
description: One of the most influencial Extreme Demons ever made in Geometry Dash, a megacollab hosted and verified by the player Riot. This level gets most of its difficulty from its extreme ship gameplay, straight fly, and precise timings. This level was made as a sequel to the Extreme Demon known as Cataclysm, even going as far to have the song fade in exactly where Cataclysm ends off at and sharing the same iconic hell theme.
